chat.startNewConversation: Start a new conversation with an AI model by clicking the New Chat button.
chat.systemPromptTooltip: The initial prompt that sets the behavior of the AI assistant in this chat.
chat.thinkingTooltip: When enabled, the model can take more time to respond, allowing for more complex reasoning. The thinking budget sets the maximum tokens the model can spend in 'thinking' before it must return a response.
chat.cacheRetentionTooltip: Controls prompt caching behavior. 'Short' uses default TTL, 'Long' extends cache lifetime (24h for OpenAI, 1h for Bedrock). Caching can reduce costs and latency for repeated prompts.
chat.temperatureTooltip: Controls randomness: lower values make responses more focused and deterministic, higher values make responses more creative and varied.
chat.thenFetchModels: Then fetch models on the models page
chat.topPTooltip: Controls diversity: lower values filter out unlikely options, higher values preserve more possibilities.
chat.resetContextLimitMessage: Would you like to reset context limit and regenerate message with max available context messages?

connectivity.awsHowTo: How to get AWS Bedrock credentials:
connectivity.awsProfile: AWS profile (useful on local dev env)
connectivity.awsStep1: 1. Sign up for an AWS account at aws.amazon.com
connectivity.awsStep3: 3. Create a new IAM user or use existing one
connectivity.awsStep6: 6. Copy the Access Key ID and Secret Access Key
connectivity.awsStep7: 7. Make sure to enable the models you need in the AWS Bedrock Console
connectivity.openaiHowTo: How to get OpenAI API keys:
connectivity.openaiStep2: 2. Sign up or log in to your account
connectivity.openaiStep5: 5. Copy the key immediately (it won't be shown again)
connectivity.openaiStep6: 6. Add billing information to enable API usage
connectivity.s3Connected: S3 storage is connected on backend and ready to use. You can add your own S3 credentials below if needed.
connectivity.storeOnServer: Store on server (to use on other devices)
connectivity.title: Connectivity
connectivity.updatedMessage: Your connectivity settings have been updated successfully
connectivity.yandexHowTo: How to get Yandex Cloud credentials:
connectivity.yandexStep3: 3. Create a service account with ai.languageModels.user role
connectivity.yandexStep4: 4. Create an API key for the service account
connectivity.yandexStep6: 6. Note your folder ID from the cloud console

home.aboutText: {{appTitle}} is a universal chatbot platform that supports multiple large language models from various providers including AWS Bedrock, OpenAI, and Yandex Foundation Models. Switch between models on the fly, generate images, process documents, and more — all within a single intuitive interface.
home.dataUsageText: {{appTitle}} requests user data solely to provide and improve the chat experience. Account information (email, name) is used for authentication and personalization. Chat messages are sent to your configured AI providers to generate responses. API keys you provide are used exclusively to connect to AI services on your behalf. We do not sell or share your personal data with third parties.

features.codeExecutionDesc: Run Python code directly in the browser with Pyodide
features.imageSupportDesc: Generate and analyze images with drag & drop and copy-paste
features.mcpSupportDesc: Connect to external Model Context Protocol servers
features.multiModelDesc: Chat with models from AWS Bedrock, OpenAI, Yandex, and more
features.ragDesc: Upload documents and get AI answers grounded in your own content
features.realTimeDesc: Stream responses in real time via WebSocket connections

home.getStartedText: Sign in or create an account to start chatting with AI models on {{appTitle}}.
home.subtitle: A universal chat interface for AI models

privacy.introText: This Privacy Policy explains how {{appTitle}} collects, uses, and protects your personal information when you use our service. We are committed to ensuring your privacy and handling your data with transparency.
privacy.dataCollectionText: When you use {{appTitle}}, we may collect the following information:
privacy.dataItem1: Account information: email address and display name provided during registration or OAuth sign-in
privacy.dataItem2: Chat data: messages you send and receive within the application
privacy.dataItem3: Usage data: interaction patterns, feature usage, and session information
privacy.dataItem4: API credentials: keys you provide to connect to AI model providers (stored securely or kept in your browser)
privacy.dataUseText: We use the collected information for the following purposes:
privacy.useItem1: To provide and maintain the chat service, including sending your messages to configured AI providers
privacy.useItem2: To authenticate your identity and manage your account
privacy.useItem3: To improve and personalize your experience
privacy.useItem4: To communicate service updates or important notices
privacy.dataSharingText: We do not sell, trade, or share your personal information with third parties for marketing purposes. Your chat messages are sent to the AI model providers you configure (such as AWS Bedrock, OpenAI, or Yandex) solely to generate responses. Each provider's own privacy policy governs their handling of that data.
privacy.thirdPartyText: {{appTitle}} integrates with third-party AI model providers and optional OAuth authentication providers (Google, GitHub, Microsoft). When you use these integrations, your data is subject to the respective third-party privacy policies.
privacy.dataSecurityText: We implement appropriate technical and organizational measures to protect your personal data against unauthorized access, alteration, disclosure, or destruction. API keys can be stored locally in your browser in demo mode or securely on our servers.
privacy.userRightsText: You have the following rights regarding your personal data:
privacy.rightItem1: Access and review the personal data we hold about you
privacy.rightItem3: Request deletion of your account and associated data
privacy.rightItem4: Export your chat history and personal data
privacy.cookiesText: We use essential cookies to maintain your authentication session and store your preferences (such as theme and language). We do not use cookies for tracking or advertising purposes.
privacy.changesText: We may update this Privacy Policy from time to time. We will notify registered users of significant changes via the application. Your continued use of the service after changes constitutes acceptance of the updated policy.
privacy.contactText: If you have questions about this Privacy Policy or your personal data, please contact the {{appTitle}} team through our project repository.

terms.introText: These Terms of Service govern your use of {{appTitle}}. By accessing or using the service, you agree to be bound by these terms. If you do not agree, please do not use the service.
terms.licenseText: {{appTitle}} is open-source software released under the MIT License.
terms.licenseDetail: Permission is hereby granted, free of charge, to any person obtaining a copy of this software and associated documentation files, to deal in the Software without restriction, including without limitation the rights to use, copy, modify, merge, publish, distribute, sublicense, and/or sell copies of the Software, subject to the conditions of the MIT License. The full license text is available in the project repository.
terms.useItem1: Not use the service for any unlawful or prohibited activities
terms.useItem2: Not attempt to disrupt or compromise the service infrastructure
terms.useItem3: Not share your account credentials with unauthorized parties
terms.useItem4: Comply with the terms of service of any third-party AI providers you connect through this platform
terms.accountsText: You are responsible for maintaining the security of your account and password. You are responsible for all activities that occur under your account. You must notify us immediately of any unauthorized use of your account.
terms.aiContentText: Content generated by AI models through this platform is provided for reference only. We do not guarantee the accuracy, completeness, or suitability of AI-generated responses. You are responsible for reviewing and verifying any AI-generated content before relying on it.
terms.apiKeysText: {{appTitle}} allows you to connect your own API keys for various AI model providers. You are solely responsible for managing your API keys, associated costs, and compliance with the respective provider's terms of service.
terms.disclaimerText: {{appTitle}} is provided "as is" without warranties of any kind, either express or implied, including but not limited to implied warranties of merchantability, fitness for a particular purpose, and non-infringement.
terms.limitationText: In no event shall the {{appTitle}} authors or contributors be liable for any direct, indirect, incidental, special, or consequential damages arising out of or in connection with your use of the service.
terms.changesText: We reserve the right to modify these terms at any time. Continued use of the service following changes constitutes acceptance of the updated terms.
terms.contactText: If you have questions about these Terms of Service, please contact the {{appTitle}} team through our project repository.
